race.comment: ZOUROSA (10) ran a bold race first-up over this distance at Mornington then faltered late over 1100m at her latest appearance in a BM62 at Wodonga. The blinkers go on for the first time and she returns to her pet trip so a return to form seems likely. NEVER A THOUGHT (5) is back after a 20-week absence. Raced just once last prep, dropping out sharply over today's journey at Mornington. Has looked good in a couple of recent jump-outs so a bright return looks on the cards. SMARTICON (3) has savaged the line at his last couple of runs, registering a win and a close third against similar opposition to this. This trip might be a tad short but he will be putting in the big strides late again. AUCKLAND (4) has raced over 1000m here twice for two wins so he can improve on recent efforts without surprising, particularly with the help of the inside draw. SHELLEY'S LEGACY (6) races well here and is capable of a positive return from a spell.
